data.title: Gray Media launches "We the People" initiative nationwide to mark America's 250th anniversary, showcasing local stories.
data.description: Atlanta, December 11, 2025 - Gray Media, Inc. is honoring the 250th anniversary of the United States of America with a special project highlighting the impact of local individuals, locations, and events on the American narrative. Under the "We the People" campaign, Gray's stations nationwide are creating numerous unique stories linking national history to community-based tales. This initiative will encompass hundreds of original narratives showcasing the diverse ways in which local influences have contributed to shaping the American identity.

data.title: Duke Energy Foundation aids local economies with $500,000 for NC small businesses. 20 nonprofits to distribute $25,000 grants each.
data.description: The Duke Energy Foundation has disclosed an initiative aimed at aiding small businesses in expanding their operations, thus bolstering economic growth and generating employment opportunities. A total of twenty nonprofit organizations have been chosen to benefit from grants totaling $25,000 each, which will be allocated to local small businesses. The announcement was made in Raleigh, North Carolina on December 11, 2025.

data.title: AIR raises $6.1M to introduce AI-driven credit ratings, eliminating bias, for public and private credit. Led by Work-Bench Ventures and Lerer Hippeau.
data.description: AIR, an AI-driven credit intelligence platform, recently revealed securing a seed round of $6.1 million. The funding was co-led by Work-Bench Ventures and Lerer Hippeau. The platform provides unbiased credit ratings for both public and private credit continuously. Developed by experienced professionals in the industry, AIR offers innovative solutions for assessing creditworthiness.

data.title: Uber partners with Stater Bros., Kowalski's, and Big Red Liquors to expand grocery and alcohol selection. Efforts to support local businesses are growing.
data.description: Uber's commitment to supporting local and regional retailers is underscored by recent partnerships. The company disclosed today that it has added Stater Bros. Markets, Kowalski's Markets, and Big Red to its Uber and Uber Eats apps. These partnerships signify Uber's expanding investment in the retail sector. The news was announced in San Francisco on December 11, 2025. Uber's stock is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol UBER.

data.title: Health Net offers assistance to those impacted by The Pack Fire in California after State of Emergency in Mono County declared. #CNC #HealthNet
data.description: In response to Gov. Newsom's declaration of a State of Emergency in Mono County on December 11, 2025, Health Net, a leading Medi-Cal managed care health plan in California and a subsidiary of Centene Corporation (NYSE: CNC), has swiftly initiated measures to...

data.title: Global Solid-State LiDAR Semiconductor Components Market valued at USD 3.2 billion in 2024. Expected to reach USD 18.7 billion by 2034 with a CAGR of 19.3%.
data.description: Dublin - A report on the Solid-State LiDAR Semiconductor Components Market predicts significant growth potential. Valued at USD 3.2 billion in 2024, the market is projected to expand at a CAGR of 19.3%, reaching USD 18.7 billion by 2034. This growth surge is fueled by the increasing incorporation of LiDAR technology in autonomous vehicles and advanced drive systems.

data.title: XLCS Partners helps Total Garage Store in investment by U.S. Dock & Door. (Nashville, Dec. 11, 2025)
data.description: In Nashville, Tennessee on December 11, 2025, XLCS Partners, Inc., a prominent middle-market investment bank, declared its role as the sole advisor to The Total Garage Store (TGS) in its recent venture with U.S. Dock & Door (USDD), a part of Soundcore Capital's portfolio.

data.title: Johnson Fistel is investigating the Grindr board for fiduciary duty breaches after terminating buyout negotiations.
data.description: A company based in San Diego, Johnson Fistel, PLLP, revealed on December 11, 2025, that they are conducting an inquiry into possible breaches of fiduciary duty by the Board of Directors of Grindr Inc. (NYSE: GRND). The investigation focuses on the Board's choice to end discussions with Grindr's controlling entity.

data.title: Global MCM market set to reach $4.05 billion by 2029 with CAGR of 6.3%; driven by naval modernization and heightened security threats.
data.description: Dublin-based research firm ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently included the "Mine Countermeasures (MCM) Global Market Report 2025" in its offerings. The MCM market is currently witnessing strong growth, projected to rise from $2.97 billion in 2024 to $4.05 billion by 2029, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.3%. This growth is driven by factors like rising maritime security concerns, ongoing naval modernization initiatives, and a surge in defense investments.

data.title: Analysts at Mizuho Securities suggest investors look into quantum computing sector for next NVIDIA. Outperform ratings on IonQ, Rigetti Computing, and D-Wave Quantum. Market potential to scale to $205 billion from current $1 billion.
data.description: Analysts from Mizuho Securities suggest that investors searching for the next NVIDIA Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) may find potential in the quantum computing industry. The firm recently initiated coverage on IonQ (NYSE: IONQ), Rigetti Computing (NASDAQ: RGTI), and D-Wave Quantum (NYSE: QBTS) with Outperform ratings. They believe that the quantum computing sector, currently valued at around $1 billion, has the potential to expand significantly, potentially reaching a market value of $205 billion in the future. For more information, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Slalom extends lease for 76,000 sq ft at Hawk Tower in Pioneer Square/Stadium District through 2034 - giving area new momentum.
data.description: In Seattle on December 11, 2025, Steinhauer Properties successfully closed a significant agreement in the Pioneer Square/Stadium District office market. The deal involved securing Slalom's renewal and extending their lease in Slalom Hawk Tower to approximately 76,000 square feet until 2034. This transaction marks a key development in the area, highlighting a long-term commitment by Slalom in the evolving commercial landscape.

data.title: Burnham Holdings, Inc. declared a dividend on its common & preferred stock along with setting the annual meeting date.
data.description: In Lancaster, Pennsylvania on December 11, 2025, Burnham Holdings, Inc. (OTC-Pink: BURCA) disclosed details regarding dividends on its common and preferred stock, along with the scheduled date for the annual shareholders meeting. The Board of Directors of Burnham Holdings, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend on its common stock.

data.title: Shareholders of Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico approve combining Cross Border Xpress with technical services with 96% votes, 88.1% quorum.
data.description: In Guadalajara, Mexico, on December 11, 2025, Grupo Aeroportuario del Pacífico, S.A.B. de C.V. (NYSE: PAC; BMV: GAP) (“GAP”) disclosed that during its recent Ordinary and Extraordinary General Shareholders’ Meeting, attended by 88.1% of shareholders, approximately 96% of the votes cast were in favor of merging the Cross Border Xpress (CBX) and providing technical assistance and technology transfer services. This merger will involve consolidating multiple entities into GAP, including Aeropuertos Mexicanos del Pacífico, S.A.P.I. de C.V. (AMP), the current strategic partner.

data.title: AlphaTON Capital Corp secures 2.2 MW of computing capacity in Sweden through deal with atNorth.
data.description: AlphaTON Capital Corp has recently disclosed its inaugural data center partnership with atNorth, succeeding in securing 2.2 megawatts of cutting-edge computing capability in Sweden.

data.title: Lil Jon and Toys"R"Us collaborate to support Autism Speaks by giving fans a chance to win his custom parade jacket.
data.description: Fans now have the opportunity to win Lil Jon's unique parade jacket, with proceeds going towards Autism Speaks. The Grammy Award-winning artist performed on the Toys"R"Us float during the 99th Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade. All donations will support the cause and help raise awareness for autism. This charitable initiative aims to make a positive impact, with the jacket being a prized possession from the event.

data.title: New book on Second Avenue Subway launched by Dan McNichol and Bill Goodrich with 150+ photos. Release on Dec 11, 2025.
data.description: Renowned author Dan McNichol and former MTA program executive Bill Goodrich have revealed the comprehensive account of New York City's largest transit endeavor, showcasing over 150 captivating images captured by acclaimed former MTA photographer Patrick Cashin. This milestone unveiling took place in New York on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Billy Corgan to receive TEC Innovation Award at 41st Annual NAMM TEC Awards on Jan. 22, 2026, during The NAMM Show. Characters: 111
data.description: The 41st edition of the NAMM TEC Awards is scheduled to be held on the evening of Thursday, January 22. The prestigious event will coincide with The NAMM Show in CARLSBAD, California. NAMM, recognized as the largest worldwide non-profit music trade association, will be hosting the event. The awards ceremony is a celebration of technical excellence within the music industry and is highly anticipated by industry professionals and enthusiasts alike.

data.title: ALLETE acquisition by CPP Investments and GIP approved by MPUC, expected to close on Dec. 15. (Numbers: NYSE: ALE, Dec. 15)
data.description: ALLETE, Inc. disclosed that they have examined the Minnesota Public Utilities Commission's written order endorsing their acquisition by Canada Pension Plan Investment Board (CPP Investments) and Global Infrastructure Partners (GIP), prominent global investors in infrastructure and sustainable energy. The acquisition, set to finalize on Dec. 15, is pending the fulfillment of certain conditions. ALLETE, Inc. trades on NYSE under the symbol ALE.

data.title: ITC Infotech wins PTC Partner Network Award for FY25 in PLM category.
data.description: ITC Infotech, based in Paramus, N.J., London, and Bangalore, India, has recently received the prestigious PTC Partner Network Award for the fiscal year 2025. The award was granted in the Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) sector, highlighting ITC Infotech's excellence in this field.

data.title: Celcuity presents updated results from PIK3CA WT cohort of VIKTORIA-1 trial at 2025 SABCS. Study covers HR+, HER2- patients with ABC, following progression on CDK4/6 inhibitor.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Celcuity Inc. (Nasdaq: CELC) disclosed fresh findings from the Phase 3 VIKTORIA-1 trial for gedatolisib, a PAM inhibitor, aimed at developing targeted therapies for oncology. The trial, focused on adults with HR+, HER2-, PIK3CA WT, ABC post-treatment with CDK4/6 and aromatase inhibitors, revealed promising outcomes. The updates were shared at the 2025 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. These results mark a significant step in advancing treatment for this patient population.
